sets.instructions_cn: 用所给形容词的正确形式（比较级或最高级）填空

steps.hint_cn: 单音节形容词加 -er 构成比较级

steps.base: Mount Everest is the [high] mountain in the world.
steps.expected: Mount Everest is the highest mountain in the world.
steps.hint_cn: 单音节形容词加 -est 构成最高级，前面加 the

steps.base: This book is [interesting] than that one.
steps.expected: This book is more interesting than that one.
steps.hint_cn: 多音节形容词用 more + 原级构成比较级

steps.base: She is the [smart] student in our class.
steps.expected: She is the smartest student in our class.

steps.base: My father is [busy] than my mother.
steps.expected: My father is busier than my mother.
steps.hint_cn: 辅音+y 结尾，变 y 为 i 加 -er → busier

sets.instructions_cn: 将 as...as 同级比较句改为比较级句

steps.base: Tom is as tall as Jerry.
steps.cue: 改为：Tom 比 Jerry 高
steps.hint_cn: as...as 同级比较改为比较级 + than

steps.base: Math is as easy as English.
steps.hint_cn: easy 变 y 为 i 加 -er → easier

steps.base: This movie is as interesting as that one.
steps.cue: 改为：这部电影比那部有趣
steps.expected: This movie is more interesting than that one.
steps.hint_cn: 多音节词用 more + 原级

steps.base: The red dress is as expensive as the blue one.
steps.cue: 改为：红裙子比蓝裙子贵
steps.expected: The red dress is more expensive than the blue one.
steps.hint_cn: expensive 是多音节词，用 more expensive

steps.base: Running is as good as swimming for health.
steps.cue: 改为：跑步比游泳对健康更好
steps.expected: Running is better than swimming for health.
steps.hint_cn: good 的比较级是 better（不规则变化）

sets.instructions_cn: 根据提示用比较级或最高级完整回答

steps.base: A lion runs 80 km/h. A horse runs 70 km/h.
steps.expected: A lion is faster than a horse.
steps.hint_cn: fast 加 -er，用 than 连接

steps.base: Tom is 10 years old. Tim is 12 years old. Tony is 8 years old.
steps.expected: Tim is the oldest (among the three).
steps.hint_cn: 三人或以上用最高级，old 加 -est

steps.base: The blue car costs $20,000. The red car costs $25,000.
steps.expected: The red car is more expensive than the blue car.
steps.hint_cn: expensive 用 more 构成比较级

steps.base: Beijing has 22 million people. Shanghai has 25 million. Tianjin has 14 million.
steps.cue: 上海在中国城市中人口如何？
steps.expected: Shanghai is the biggest city (among the three).
steps.hint_cn: big 双写 g 加 -gest → biggest

steps.base: I think history is very interesting. I think science is interesting too.
steps.cue: 比较你对历史和科学的看法
steps.expected: I think history is more interesting than science.
steps.hint_cn: interesting 是多音节词，用 more
